name: Embedded Video
description: Accessible YouTube, Vimeo or direct video with privacy-conscious embeds, safe media URLs, responsive ratios, captions and transcript support.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Embedded Video
attribute_definition_groups.description: Accessible YouTube, Vimeo or direct video with privacy-conscious embeds, safe media URLs, responsive ratios, captions and transcript support.

attribute_definitions.name: Video URL
attribute_definitions.description: HTTPS YouTube or Vimeo URL, or an HTTPS/storefront-relative MP4, WebM or Ogg file. Other hosts and protocols are rejected.

attribute_definitions.name: Accessible video title
attribute_definitions.description: Required concise title announced by assistive technology for the player.

attribute_definitions.name: Play button label
attribute_definitions.description: Localised action label shown by click-to-play, for example “Play video” or “Reproducir vídeo”.

attribute_definitions.name: Poster image
attribute_definitions.description: Optional poster shown by click-to-play and before a direct video starts.

attribute_definitions.name: Visible caption
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting text displayed beneath the player.

attribute_definitions.name: WebVTT captions URL
attribute_definitions.description: Optional HTTPS or storefront-relative .vtt captions file for direct video.

attribute_definitions.name: Captions language
attribute_definitions.description: BCP 47 language code such as en, es or es-ES.

attribute_definitions.name: Captions label
attribute_definitions.description: Language name shown in the native player captions menu, for example “Español”.

attribute_definitions.name: Transcript URL
attribute_definitions.description: Optional secure HTTPS or storefront-relative transcript destination.

attribute_definitions.name: Transcript link label
attribute_definitions.description: Localised text for the optional transcript link.

attribute_definitions.name: Aspect ratio
attribute_definitions.description: Responsive player frame ratio. Portrait is intended for vertical campaign video.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum width
attribute_definitions.description: Full uses the available region; Wide and Narrow apply readable storefront maximum widths.

attribute_definitions.name: Click to play
attribute_definitions.description: Recommended for YouTube and Vimeo. The third-party iframe is not loaded until the shopper activates the player.

attribute_definitions.name: Start time in seconds
attribute_definitions.description: Optional whole-second offset, limited to 24 hours.

attribute_definitions.name: Autoplay
attribute_definitions.description: Disabled by default. Available for Vimeo and direct video; YouTube remains manual because its documented embed parameters cannot guarantee muted autoplay.

attribute_definitions.name: Muted
attribute_definitions.description: Starts Vimeo or direct playback without sound. Supported autoplay forces this option on at runtime.

attribute_definitions.name: Loop
attribute_definitions.description: Restarts the video when playback reaches the end.

attribute_definitions.name: Direct video preload
attribute_definitions.description: Metadata loads video dimensions and duration; None defers media loading until playback.

attribute_definitions.name: Allow fullscreen
attribute_definitions.description: Lets shoppers open provider videos in fullscreen mode.
